user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure when employees are notified of their appreciation scores each month, so that recognition is communicated on a set schedule
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Appreciations screen; When I set the day of the month to notify employees of their scores; Then the notification schedule is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the date from which score calculation starts, so that appreciation points are tallied over the correct period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Appreciations screen; When I select the score calculation start date from the calendar; Then it is saved as the calculation start

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save the appreciation settings, so that the configuration takes effect
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the notification day and calculation start; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the settings are persisted
